Part.Source:
retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta)
RetornaCOnfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs, &TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs)
&versao = RetornaVersaoNotas.Udp(VersaoNota.VersaoCTe) &CTeChv = 'CTe' ValidatributoServicoCte.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod) For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod //################################################## //MONTA A CHAVE DO CTE // cUF - Código da UF do emitente do Documento Fiscal //· AAMM - Ano e Mês de emissão do CT-e //· CNPJ - CNPJ do emitente //· mod - Modelo do Documento Fiscal //· serie - Série do Documento Fiscal //· nCT - Número do Documento Fiscal //· tpEmis – Forma de emissão do CT-e //· cCT - Código Numérico que compõe a Chave de Acesso //· cDV - Dígito Verificador da Chave de Acesso
&tpAmb = FilAmbEms.ToString() &tpEmis = FilTipEms.ToString() &cUF = RetornaCodigoSiglaEstado.Udp(0, FilCidUfeCod) &CNPJ = TRIM(retornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCpj)) &cNF = PadL(trim(str(CteNum)), 8, '0') &dEmi = CteDtaEms &AAMM = padL(SubStr(LTrim(str(Year(&dEmi), 4, 0)), 3, 2), 2, '0') + padL(LTrim(str(Month(&dEmi), 2, 0)), 2, '0')
//Calculando o DV pelo modulo11 &aux = PadL(&cUF, 2, '0') + PadL(&AAMM, 4, '0') + PadL(&CNPJ, 14, '0') + PadL(CteModCod, 2, '0') + PadL(CteSer.ToString().Trim(), 3, '0') + PadL(CteNum.ToString().Trim(), 9, '0') + PadL(FilTipEms, 1, '0') + PadL(&cNF, 8, '0') &cDV = RetornaModulo11.Udp(&aux)
//CHAVE DA CTE &CteChv = PadL(&cUF, 2, '0') + PadL(&AAMM, 4, '0') + PadL(&CNPJ, 14, '0') + PadL(CteModCod, 2, '0') + PadL(CteSer.ToString().Trim(), 3, '0') + PadL(CteNum.ToString().Trim(), 9, '0') + PadL(FilTipEms, 1, '0') + PadL(&cNF, 8, '0') + PadL(&cDV, 1, '0')
If &Transmitir = 'S' //GERA ARQUIVO XML NA PASTA ENVIO &ArquivoEnvio.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFenvio + &CTeChv.Trim() + '-cte.xml' If &ArquivoEnvio.Exists() &ArquivoEnvio.Delete() EndIf &Nome_enviar = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFenvio.Trim() + trim(&CTeChv) + '-cte.xml' EndIf
&ArqCte.Open(&Nome_enviar) // Abrir o arquivo XML &ArqCte.WriteStartDocument('UTF-8') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('CTeOS') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('versao',&versao) &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xmlns','http://www.portalfiscal.inf.br/cte') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCte') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('Id','CTe'+&CteChv) &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('versao',&versao) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ide') &ArqCte.WriteElement('cUF',SubStr(trim(str(FilCidUfeIbge)),1,2)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cCT',padl(trim(str(CteNum)),8,'0')) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CFOP',trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteCfop))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('natOp',CteNatOpe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('mod',CteModCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('serie',CteSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nCT',CteNum) &Hoje = CteDtaEms &soNumero = str(year(&Hoje),4,0) +'-'+padl(trim(str(month(&Hoje),2,0)),2,'0') +'-'+padl(trim(str(day(&Hoje),2,0)),2,'0') +'T'+trim(CteHorEms) +'-'+ trim(FilFusHor) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dhEmi',&soNumero) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpImp','1') // 1-Retrato 2 -Paisagem &tpEmis = IIf(FilTipEms = NF_TipoEmissao.Normal,'1','5') &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpEmis',&tpEmis) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cDV',&cDV) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpAmb',FilAmbEms) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpCTe',CteFinEms) &ArqCte.WriteElement('procEmi',TProcEmi.AppContribuinte) &VerProc = RetornaVersaoNotas.Udp(VersaoNota.VersaoCTe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('verProc',&VerProc)
If CteindGlo = true &ArqCte.WriteElement('indGlobalizado',1) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMunEnv',FilCidUfeIbge) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMunEnv',FilCidNom) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFEnv',FilCidUfeCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('modal',CteMod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpServ',CteTipSer) iF CtePapTom.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('indIEToma','9') else &ArqCte.WriteElement('indIEToma',CtePapTom) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('cMunIni',CteIniCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMunIni',CteIniCidNom) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFIni',CteIniUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMunFim',CteTerCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMunFim',CteTerCidNom) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFFim',CteTerUfe)
//PERCURSO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod,CteCod, CtePerCod &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infPercurso')// <infPercurso> &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFPer', trim(CtePerUfeCod))// <UFPer>PR</UFPer> &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()// </infPercurso> EndFor
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //ide
////################################### comp &compl = 0 If Not CteDadAdiSer.Trim().IsEmpty() or Not CteDadAdiTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('compl') &compl = 1 EndIf
If Not CteDadAdiTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCaracAd',CteDadAdiTra) EndIf
If Not CteDadAdiSer.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCaracSer',CteDadAdiSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xEmi',CteEmiFunCod) EndIf &CteObsGer.SetEmpty() &CteObsGer = CteObsAut.Trim() +' '+ CteObsGer.Trim()
If &compl = 0 and not &CteObsGer.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('compl') &compl = 1 EndIf If not &CteObsGer.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xObs',Trim(&CteObsGer)) EndIf
If &compl = 1 //é pq abriu &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //compl se abriu então fecha EndIf ///#############################################################
Do 'GetFilial' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('emit') //EMITENTE &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',&FilCpj) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',&FilInsEst)
//###########################Inscrição Estadual do Substituto Tributário For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FilUfeCodST Where FilUfeCodST = CteTerUfe if not FilUfeInsST.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('IEST',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilUfeInsST))//Inscrição Estadual do Substituto Tributário endif Exit EndFor //#######################################################################
&ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',&FilRaz) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xFant',trim(&FilFan)) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderEmit') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',&FilLog) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',&FilNro) If not &FilCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',&FilCpl) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',&FilBai) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',&FilCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',&FilCidNom) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',&FilCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',&FilCidUfeCod) If not &FilFonNum.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(retornasoNumeros.Udp(&FilFonNum))) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderEmit RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.call(EmpCod, FilBasImp, &FilRegTrib, &TbImpUfeCod)
&ArqCte.WriteElement('CRT', &FilRegTrib)
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//emit
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('toma') ///Indicador do "papel" do tomador do serviço no CT-e If not CteTomCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',retornasoNumeros.Udp(CteTomCnpj)) &CteTomInsEst = retornasoNumeros.Udp(CteTomInsEst) If &CteTomInsEst.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE','ISENTO') Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',TRIM(&CteTomInsEst)) EndIf
Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',retornasoNumeros.Udp(CteTomCpf)) EndIf
If FilAmbEms = TAmb.Homologacao &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome','CT-E EMITIDO EM AMBIENTE DE HOMOLOGACAO - SEM VALOR FISCAL') Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteTomRaz)) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('xFant',trim(CteTomFan)) If not CteTomFon.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(retornasoNumeros.Udp(CteTomFon))) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderToma') /// abriu &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(CteTomLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(CteTomNro)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(CteTomCpl)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(CteTomBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',CteTomCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',Trim(CteTomCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',CteTomCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteTomUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cPais',CteTomPaiCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xPais',CteTomPaiNom) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderToma &ArqCte.WriteElement('email',trim(CteTomEml)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //toma04 //Indicador do "papel" do tomador do serviço no CT-e
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('vPrest') //PRESTAÇÃO &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTPrest',CteVlrTotPreSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vRec',CteVlrRecSer) If CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Sim For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CtePreCod If CteVlrPreCom > 0 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('Comp') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(Upper(CteNomPreCom))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vComp',CteVlrPreCom) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() EndIf EndFor EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('imp') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS') //Informações relativas aos Impostos Do Case Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal //'00' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS00') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMS',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteImpVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida // '20' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS20') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedBC',CteImpPerRed) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMS',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteImpVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
// '40' '41' '51' Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Isento or CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.NaoTributada or CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Deferido &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS45') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao //60 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS60') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBCSTRet',CteImpVbcRet) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMSSTRet',CteImpVstRet) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSSTRet',CteImpAliRet) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCred',CteImpVlrCre) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.outros //90 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS90') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) If CteImpPerRed > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedBC',CteImpPerRed) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMS',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteImpVlr) If CteImpVlrCre >0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCred',CteImpVlrCre) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement() Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.OutraUF //90 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMSOutraUF') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedBCOutraUF',CteImpPerRed) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBCOutraUF',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSOutraUF',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMSOutraUF',CteImpVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples //90 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMSSN') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST','90') If CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Sim &ArqCte.WriteElement('indSN',1) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
EndCase &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ICMS
If CteImpVlrTotTri > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTotTrib',CteImpVlrTotTri) EndIf
If CteImpTriVlrPis > 0 or CteImpTriVlrCofins > 0 or CteImpTriVlrIr > 0 or CteImpTriVlrInss > 0 or CteImpTriVlrCsll > 0 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infTribFed') If CteImpTriVlrPis > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vPIS',CteImpTriVlrPis) EndIf If CteImpTriVlrCofins > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCOFINS',CteImpTriVlrCofins) EndIf If CteImpTriVlrIr > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vIR',CteImpTriVlrIr) EndIf If CteImpTriVlrInss > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vINSS',CteImpTriVlrInss) EndIf If CteImpTriVlrCsll > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCSLL',CteImpTriVlrCsll) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement() EndIf
If not CteImpObsFis.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('infAdFisco',trim(CteImpObsFis)) EndIf
//IBS CBS //Valores IBS e CBS &NfeIbsBasVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsBas, 18, 2))
&NfeIbsUfPerVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfTax, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsUfPerRedVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfTaxRed, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsUfPerEfeVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfTaxEfe, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsUfVlrVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfVlr, 18, 2))
&NfeIbsMunPerVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunTax, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsMunPerRedVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunTaxRed, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsMunPerEfeVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunTaxEfe, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsMunVlrVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunVlr, 18,2))
&NfeCbsPerVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsTax, 18, 4)) &NfeCbsPerRedVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsTaxRed, 18, 4)) &NfeCbsPerEfeVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsTaxEfe, 18, 4)) &NfeCbsVlrVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsVlr, 18,2))
&TotalIbsMoeda = CteIbsMunVlr+CteIbsUfVlr &NfeTotalIbsVarchar = trim(Str(&TotalIbsMoeda,18,2))
if (not CteIbsCST.IsEmpty() and not CteIbsCST.IsNull()) and &TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs <> 'N' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('IBSCBS') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',trim(CteIbsCST)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cClassTrib',trim(CteIbsClassTrib))
//precisa retornar as configuracoes do ClassTrib &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST = CteIbsCST &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib = CteIbsClassTrib prcRetornaClassTrib_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs)
//Base Calculo if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.Cltind_gIBSCBS = 'S' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gIBSCBS') &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',trim(&NfeIbsBasVarchar))
//Ibs UF caso tenha aliquota &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gIBSUF') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pIBSUF',trim(&NfeIbsUfPerVarchar))
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltIsDif = 'S' //Exige Diferimento &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gDif') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pDif',trim(Str(CteIbsUfTaxDif,18,4))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDif',trim(Str(CteIbsUfVlrDif,18,2))) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gDif Endif
if CteIbsUfTaxRed > 0 //caso tenha reducao preencher tags &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gRed') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedAliq',trim(&NfeIbsUfPerRedVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfet',trim(&NfeIbsUfPerEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gRed Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vIBSUF',&NfeIbsUfVlrVarchar) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gIBSUF
//Ibs Municipio caso tenha &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gIBSMun') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pIBSMun',trim(&NfeIbsMunPerVarchar))
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltIsDif = 'S' //Exige Diferimento &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gDif') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pDif',trim(Str(CteIbsMunTaxDif,18,4))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDif',trim(Str(CteIbsMunVlrDif,18,2))) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gDif Endif
if CteIbsMunTaxRed > 0 //caso tenha reducao preencher tags &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gRed') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedAliq',trim(&NfeIbsMunPerRedVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfet',trim(&NfeIbsMunPerEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gRed Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vIBSMun', &NfeIbsMunVlrVarchar) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gIBSMun
//valor tota do ibs if CteIbsMunTaxEfe > 0 or CteIbsUfTaxEfe > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vIBS', &NfeTotalIbsVarchar) Endif
//Cbs &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gCBS') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pCBS',trim(&NfeCbsPerVarchar))
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltIsDif = 'S' //Exige Diferimento &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gDif') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pDif',trim(Str(CteCbsTaxDif,18,4))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDif',trim(Str(CteCbsVlrDif,18,2))) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gDif Endif
if CteCbsTaxRed > 0 //caso tenha reducao preencher tags &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gRed') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedAliq',trim(&NfeCbsPerRedVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfet',trim(&NfeCbsPerEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gRed Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vCBS',trim(&NfeCbsVlrVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gCBS Endif
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsIsTribReg = 'S' //Exige Tributacao Regular &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gTribRegular')
&NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfeVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUfTax, 18,4)) &NfeRegIbsUfeVlrVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUfVlr, 18,2)) &NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfeVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegMunTax, 18,4)) &NfeRegIbsMunVlrVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegMunVlr, 18,2)) &NfeRegCbsTaxEfeVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUnTax, 18,4)) &NfeRegCbsTaxVlrVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUnVlr, 18,2))
&ArqCte.WriteElement('CSTReg',trim(CteTribRegCst)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cClassTribReg',trim(CteTribRegClassTrib)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfetRegIBSUF',trim(&NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTribRegIBSUF',trim(&NfeRegIbsUfeVlrVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfetRegIBSMun',trim(&NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTribRegIBSMun',trim(&NfeRegIbsMunVlrVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfetRegCBS',trim(&NfeRegCbsTaxEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTribRegCBS',trim(&NfeRegCbsTaxVlrVarchar))
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gTribRegular Endif
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gIBSCBS
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//IBSCBS Endif
&Data2026 = YMdtoD(2026,12,31)
&vTotDFe = CteVlrTotPreSer if CteDtaEms > &Data2026 &vTotDFe += CteCbsVlr + &TotalIbsMoeda Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vTotDFe', trim(Str(&vTotDFe, 18,2))) //ICBSCBS
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //imp
If CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCTeNorm') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infServico') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xDescServ',trim(CteSerDes))
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infQ') &ArqCte.WriteElement('qCarga',CteCarQtd) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //infQ EndFor
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infServico &seg = 1 For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteSegCod If &seg = 1 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('seg') //Informações de Seguro da Carga &seg = 2 EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('respSeg',CteSegCod) If not CteSegNom.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xSeg',trim(CteSegNom)) EndIf If not CteSegApl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nApol',trim(CteSegApl)) EndIf If not CteSegAbr.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nAver',trim(CteSegAbr)) EndIf If CteSeqVlrCar > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCarga',CteSeqVlrCar) EndIf EndFor
If &seg = 2 &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//seg EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infModal') &ArqCte.Writeattribute('versaoModal',&versao) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('rodoOS')
If not CteModRodTaf.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('TAF',trim(retornasonumeros.Udp(CteModRodTaf))) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('NroRegEstadual',Trim(retornasonumeros.Udp(CteModRodNroRegEst))) EndIf
If not CtePlcTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('veic') &ArqCte.WriteElement('placa',strReplace(trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(CtePlcTra)),' ','')) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//veic EndIf
Else &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCteComp') &ArqCte.WriteElement('chave',CteTomChvCpl) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infCteComp EndIf
If CteTipSer = TiposervicoCte.TransportePessoas &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infFretamento') &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpFretamento',CteTipFrt) If CteTipFrt = tipofretamento.Eventual &soNumero = str(year(CteDtaHorVia),4,0) +'-'+padl(trim(str(month(CteDtaHorVia),2,0)),2,'0') +'-'+padl(trim(str(day(CteDtaHorVia),2,0)),2,'0') +'T'+padl(trim(str(Hour(CteDtaHorVia))),2,'0')+':'+padl(trim(str(Minute(CteDtaHorVia))),2,'0')+':'+padl(trim(str(second(CteDtaHorVia))),2,'0') +' -'+ trim(FilFusHor) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dhViagem',&soNumero) EndiF &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infFretamento EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//rodoOS &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infModal &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//CTe &ArqCte.Close()
CteChv = &CteChv
EndFor
If &Transmitir = 'S' commit
RetornaExisteSolicitacaoPendente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_CTE, &IsPendente, &SolCod) if &SolCod.IsEmpty() GravaSolicitacao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_CTE, &PesCod, &SolCod) Endif EndIF
Sub 'GetFilial' For each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &FilCpj = reTornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCpj) &FilRaz = substr(trim(FilRaz),1,60) If FilInsEst.Trim() <> 'ISENTO' &FilInsEst = reTornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilInsEst) Else &FilInsEst = FilInsEst EndIf &FilFan = substr(trim(FilFan),1,60) &FilLog = substr(trim(FilLog),1,60) &FilNro = trim(FilNro) &FilBai = trim(FilBai) &FilCep = trim(reTornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCep)) &FilCpl = FilCpl &FilCidCod = FilCidUfeIbge &FilCidNom = FilCidNom &FilCidUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod &FilFonNum = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilFonNum) Exit EndFor EndSub
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&CteCod, in:&Transmitir, in:&PesCod, inout:&SolCod);
